title: Tiger's Loading Backgrounds
description: Add-on to the Loading Background mod! Multiple original HD screenshots
body:
This resource pack is an add-on to the [Loading Backgrounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/loading-backgrounds) mod.
It includes many of my favourite HD pictures that myself have taken and collected over the years.
The shaders used in these screenshots are [Complementary Shaders](https://www.complementary.dev/shaders/) and [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches).

<u>Heads up</u> that these pictures aren't just generic ambient screenshots, some of them will have players since these are pictures that I have taken for memories. They still look awesome regardless.

**The screenshots are not 4K because the mod downscales pictures to the set Minecraft resolution, which would make compressed images look just plain terrible.** Between having 1080p pictures and a smaller zip file size and 4K pictures with at least 6x the size, having myself no way to even see the 4K resolution, I chose size efficiency.

You can check the Gallery up top for a preview of a couple.
